name: Advocate CLI Entry Point
description: Command-line interface for the Advocate six-persona adversarial review engine. Provides commands to review code/documentation via files, directories, or stdin, and to list available personas. Orchestrates input loading, LLM provider setup, parallel/sequential review execution, and output formatting (terminal, JSON, HTML).

functions.name: main
functions.description: Click command group entry point for Advocate CLI. Serves as the root command for all subcommands.
postconditions: Click group is initialized and ready to dispatch to subcommands

functions.name: review
functions.description: Review command that analyzes a file, directory, or stdin input using multiple adversarial personas. Supports provider selection, persona filtering, output formats (JSON/HTML), and parallel/sequential execution modes.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: Path to file or directory to review

inputs.name: sequential
inputs.description: Run personas sequentially instead of parallel

error_cases.name: missing_input
error_cases.condition: No target provided and stdin is a tty

error_data.message: Error: provide a target path or use --stdin.

error_cases.name: empty_input
error_cases.condition: Content is empty or only whitespace

error_cases.name: unknown_persona
error_cases.condition: Specified persona name not in Persona enum

error_cases.name: truncation_declined
error_cases.condition: Content > 200k chars and user declines truncation confirmation

preconditions: Either target is provided or use_stdin is True
If no target and not use_stdin, stdin must not be a tty
All specified persona names must exist in Persona enum
postconditions: Review is executed and results are printed to stdout
If output specified, JSON file is written
If html specified, HTML file is written
side_effects: Reads from stdin if use_stdin or target is None
May write JSON file if output specified
May write HTML file if html specified
Makes network calls to LLM provider
May prompt user for confirmation if content > 200k chars

structured_side_effects.description: Writes review results if paths specified

functions.name: personas
functions.description: List all available personas with their metadata including name, tagline, success criteria, and dimensions.
postconditions: All Persona enum values and their metadata are printed to stdout

invariants: Content is truncated at 200,000 characters if exceeded
Default is 6 personas if none specified
Stdin target is named '<stdin>' with type 'stdin'

data_access.rationale: CLI reads input from files/stdin, writes output to terminal and optional JSON/HTML files

side_effects.rationale: Review function invokes LLM provider APIs via create_provider and run_review
CLI exits process on validation errors or user cancellation
